narrative:
Hamilton City Sd city school district has 35,150 registered voters, with 64.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a clear Republican lean of 7.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.6% D−R vs -15.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
